questions.question: The river of the water of life flows from where?
options: The throne of God and of the Lamb
questions.correct: The throne of God and of the Lamb
questions.feedback: The river of the water of life flows from the throne of God and of the Lamb.

questions.question: The tree of life bears fruit how often?
questions.feedback: The tree of life bears twelve crops of fruit, yielding its fruit every month.

questions.question: Jesus says he is coming soon.
questions.feedback: He who testifies to these things says: Yes, I am coming soon.

questions.question: The leaves of the tree of life are for the _____ of the nations.
questions.feedback: The leaves of the tree are for the healing of the nations.

questions.question: The Spirit and the bride say _____. Let the one who hears say _____.
questions.feedback: The Spirit and the bride say Come! Let the one who is thirsty come.
